title: Output Document Metadata
description: JSON Schema for the YAML frontmatter of all files produced by agents and workflows under outputs/.

workflow.description: Name of the workflow that created this file (e.g., 'spec-kit', 'feature-implementation', 'quality-validation').

status.description: Document lifecycle status. Starts as 'draft' on creation, moves to 'review' when submitted for review, 'validated' after approval, 'superseded' when replaced, 'archived' when retired.

inputDocuments.description: List of document paths (relative to repo root) used by the workflow to produce this document.

changeHistory.description: Chronological log of changes. First entry is the initial creation.

holisticQualityRating.description: Quality rating assigned after agent review. 'excellent' = exceeds expectations, 'good' = meets expectations, 'adequate' = acceptable with minor gaps, 'poor' = below expectations, 'insufficient' = does not meet minimum standards.

overallStatus.description: Overall health verdict after review. 'good' = no issues, 'warning' = minor issues acceptable with caveats, 'critical' = significant issues requiring rework, 'not-reviewed' = not yet evaluated.

changes.description: List of individual changes made by agents on the document.
